title: Chocco's Mobs
body:
This is a beta, it's not ready.

This mod adds new mobs.
It currently has only 12 mobs and i plan on adding more mobs in the future.
![Title of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dee8c59a5449a8506b8c6d81d93ba628195908f4.png)
![Group photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bc9f226bd145003f0b41930ed1becfea399b165.png)
Features that have been added
Crocodiles, Crocodile teeth and spears
Monkeys and Bananas
Penguins
Flamingos and Shrimps
Lions
Raccoons, Red Pandas and Trash bins
Octopi
Ducks
Lizards
Turkeys
Piranhas
Hermit Crabs
Kakapos
Tigers
Skunks and Tomatoes

[Curseforge download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/choccos-mobs)
[My Discord server](https://discord.gg/gWdqAQbzXG)
